name: Hive
description: Honeycomb chips in amber and gold — each hexagon pulses to its own size and twist whenever the seed changes.

code.style: --honey: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --hs: @rand(0.55, 0.98); --hr: @p(0deg, 30deg, 90deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--honey); clip-path: @shape(hexagon); transform: scale(var(--hs)) rotate(var(--hr)); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
